content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/app.py:1	from flask import Flask, render_template, request, redirect, url_for, flash2	from database import db, init_db3	from models import URL4	import string5	import random6	7	app = Flask(__name__)8	app.config['SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI'] = 'sqlite:///urls.db'9	app.config['SQLALCHEMY_TRACK_MODIFICATIONS'] = False10	app.config['SECRET_KEY'] = 'secret_key'11	12	init_db(app)13	14	def generate_short_code(length=6):15	    chars = string.ascii_letters + string.digits16	    while True:17	        code = ''.join(random.choice(chars) for _ in range(length))18	        if not URL.query.filter_by(short_code=code).first():19	            return code20	21	@app.route('/', methods=['GET', 'POST'])22	def index():23	    if request.method == 'POST':24	        original_url = request.form.get('url')25	        if not original_url:26	            flash('URL is required!')27	            return redirect(url_for('index'))28	        29	        url_entry = URL.query.filter_by(original_url=original_url).first()30	        if url_entry:31	            short_url = request.host_url + url_entry.short_code32	        else:33	            short_code = generate_short_code()34	            new_url = URL(original_url=original_url, short_code=short_code)35	            db.session.add(new_url)36	            db.session.commit()37	            short_url = request.host_url + short_code38	        39	        return render_template('index.html', short_url=short_url)40	    41	    return render_template('index.html')42	43	@app.route('/<short_code>')44	def redirect_to_url(short_code):45	    url_entry = URL.query.filter_by(short_code=short_code).first_or_404()46	    return redirect(url_entry.original_url)47	48	if __name__ == '__main__':49	    with app.app_context():50	        db.create_all()51	    app.run(debug=True)
